meta.certificationName: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Data Engineer Associate (DP-700)
meta.title: MS-FDE-4: OneLake Design, Fabric Pipelines, and Real-Time Operations

questions.stem: A Fabric team wants one logical data lake shared by lakehouses, warehouses, and real-time items without copying files between services. Which Fabric component provides that foundation?

options.explanation: `OneLake` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: An engineer needs to expose external ADLS Gen2 data in Fabric without physically duplicating the files. What should the engineer create?

options.explanation: `A shortcut` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: Which Fabric item is built around open parquet and Delta tables for engineering and Spark-based analytics workloads?

options.explanation: `Lakehouse` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A SQL-focused analytics team wants a Fabric item optimized for relational warehousing and T-SQL workloads. Which item should they choose?

options.explanation: `Warehouse` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A data engineer is organizing data into bronze, silver, and gold layers inside Fabric. Which architectural pattern is this?

options.explanation: `Medallion architecture` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A team wants a managed orchestration experience for scheduling copy, notebook, and data movement activities in Fabric. Which capability is most relevant?

options.explanation: `Data Factory pipelines` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.explanation: `Dataflow Gen2` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.explanation: `Data Factory pipeline` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.explanation: `Deployment pipelines` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: An engineer wants to parameterize and schedule a sequence of ingestion and transformation steps across Fabric items. Which concept is the best fit?

options.explanation: `Pipeline activities and triggers` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.explanation: `Apache Spark in Fabric` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: Which table format is the default open standard commonly used in Fabric lakehouses for reliable ACID-style table operations?

options.explanation: `Delta Lake` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A Fabric engineer wants to transform raw bronze data into curated silver tables using notebook code and Spark. Which item type supports that workflow most directly?

options.explanation: `Lakehouse with Spark notebooks` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A team wants to read and write large datasets using Spark while keeping data in OneLake. Which pairing is most natural in Fabric?

options.explanation: `Spark with a lakehouse` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: Why do Fabric lakehouse teams commonly store curated tables in Delta format rather than unmanaged CSV folders?

options.text: Delta tables provide managed table semantics and reliable updates for analytics workflows
options.explanation: `Delta tables provide managed table semantics and reliable updates for analytics workflows` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.text: Delta is required for every warehouse query
CSV cannot be stored in OneLake

options.explanation: `Monitoring hub` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A pipeline run fails overnight. Where should the engineer first look in Fabric to inspect execution status and failure details for orchestrated items?

options.explanation: `Monitoring hub` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A team wants operators to review execution history for Fabric jobs from one central experience rather than opening each item individually. What capability addresses that need?

options.explanation: `Monitoring hub` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

questions.stem: A Fabric team wants to avoid unnecessary data copies between analytics items and external storage when possible. Which design choice supports that goal?

options.explanation: `Use OneLake shortcuts where appropriate` best fits the scenario based on the official documentation. The other options either solve a different problem, require more custom work, or do not provide the capability asked for.

options.text: Export every source into separate CSV files
Duplicate each table into every workspace

questions.stem: A team is designing medallion layers in OneLake. Which practice usually improves manageability and downstream performance over repeatedly querying raw files directly?

options.text: Curate cleaned silver and gold Delta tables

options.text: Keep every workload on raw bronze folders forever
